description.en_US: Integrate Google Calendar into Atomemo workflows
description.zh_Hans: 将 Google 日历集成到 Atomemo 工作流中

description.en_US: OAuth2 for Google Calendar API. Enter Client ID and Client Secret from Google Cloud Console, then authorize via the OAuth flow to connect your calendar.
description.zh_Hans: Google Calendar API 的 OAuth2 凭证。在 Google Cloud Console 填入 Client ID 和 Client Secret，然后通过 OAuth 授权流程连接你的日历。

hint.en_US: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console
hint.zh_Hans: 来自 Google Cloud Console 的 OAuth 2.0 客户端 ID

hint.en_US: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console
hint.zh_Hans: 来自 Google Cloud Console 的 OAuth 2.0 客户端密钥

description.en_US: Get calendar metadata by ID
description.zh_Hans: 根据 ID 获取日历元数据

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

description.en_US: Create a new secondary calendar
description.zh_Hans: 创建新的次要日历

llm_description.en_US: Title of the calendar.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标题。

hint.en_US: Calendar name/title
hint.zh_Hans: 日历名称

llm_description.en_US: Description of the calendar.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历描述。

hint.en_US: Calendar description
hint.zh_Hans: 日历描述

llm_description.en_US: Geographic location of the calendar as free-form text.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历的地理位置，自由格式文本。

hint.en_US: Geographic location of the calendar
hint.zh_Hans: 日历的地理位置

llm_description.en_US: IANA Time Zone Database name for the calendar, e.g. "America/Los_Angeles", "Asia/Shanghai".
llm_description.zh_Hans: IANA 时区名称，例如 "Asia/Shanghai"、"America/Los_Angeles"。

hint.en_US: Default timezone in IANA format. Examples: Asia/Shanghai, America/Los_Angeles, Europe/London
hint.zh_Hans: 默认时区，IANA 格式。示例：Asia/Shanghai、America/Los_Angeles、Europe/London

description.en_US: Update calendar metadata
description.zh_Hans: 更新日历元数据

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

llm_description.en_US: New title of the calendar. Leave empty to keep unchanged.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 新的日历标题。留空则不修改。

hint.en_US: Calendar name/title
hint.zh_Hans: 日历名称

llm_description.en_US: New description of the calendar.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 新的日历描述。

hint.en_US: Calendar description
hint.zh_Hans: 日历描述

llm_description.en_US: New geographic location as free-form text.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 新的地理位置，自由格式文本。

hint.en_US: Geographic location of the calendar
hint.zh_Hans: 日历的地理位置

llm_description.en_US: New IANA timezone for the calendar, e.g. "Asia/Shanghai", "America/Los_Angeles".
llm_description.zh_Hans: 新的 IANA 时区，例如 "Asia/Shanghai"、"America/Los_Angeles"。

hint.en_US: Default timezone in IANA format. Examples: Asia/Shanghai, America/Los_Angeles, Europe/London
hint.zh_Hans: 默认时区，IANA 格式。示例：Asia/Shanghai、America/Los_Angeles、Europe/London

description.en_US: Delete a secondary calendar
description.zh_Hans: 删除次要日历

llm_description.en_US: Secondary calendar identifier. Must be a calendar email address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Do NOT use "primary" — this operation cannot target the primary calendar. Call "List Calendars" to find available IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 次要日历标识符。必须为日历邮箱地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。不能使用 "primary"——此操作不能用于主日历。调用「列出日历」获取可用 ID。

hint.en_US: Secondary calendar ID (email address). Cannot use "primary". Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 次要日历 ID（邮箱地址格式）。不能使用 "primary"。可通过「列出日历」获取 ID。

description.en_US: DANGEROUS: Permanently delete ALL events from the primary calendar. This operation only works on the primary calendar and cannot be undone.
description.zh_Hans: 危险操作：永久删除主日历中的所有事件。此操作仅适用于主日历，且不可撤销。

llm_description.en_US: Only "primary" is allowed. This dangerous operation clears ALL events from the primary calendar and CANNOT be undone.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 仅允许 "primary"。此危险操作将永久删除主日历中的所有事件，且不可撤销。

hint.en_US: ⚠️ Only works on primary calendar. This will permanently delete ALL events!
hint.zh_Hans: ⚠️ 仅适用于主日历。将永久删除所有事件！

description.en_US: List calendars in the user's calendar list
description.zh_Hans: 列出用户日历列表中的日历

description.en_US: Get a single calendar from the user's calendar list
description.zh_Hans: 从用户日历列表中获取单个日历

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

description.en_US: Add an existing calendar to the user's calendar list
description.zh_Hans: 将现有日历添加到用户日历列表

llm_description.en_US: Secondary calendar identifier. Must be a calendar email address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Do NOT use "primary" — this operation cannot target the primary calendar. Call "List Calendars" to find available IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 次要日历标识符。必须为日历邮箱地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。不能使用 "primary"——此操作不能用于主日历。调用「列出日历」获取可用 ID。

hint.en_US: Secondary calendar ID (email address). Cannot use "primary". Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 次要日历 ID（邮箱地址格式）。不能使用 "primary"。可通过「列出日历」获取 ID。

hint.en_US: Whether to show this calendar in the UI
hint.zh_Hans: 是否在界面中显示此日历

llm_description.en_US: Calendar color ID (1-24) referencing the calendar section of the colors definition.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历颜色 ID（1-24），引用颜色定义中的日历部分。

hint.en_US: Predefined color ID (1-11 for calendar)
hint.zh_Hans: 预定义颜色 ID（1-11）

description.en_US: Update user-specific calendar list properties
description.zh_Hans: 更新用户特定的日历列表属性

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Calendar name/title
hint.zh_Hans: 日历名称

llm_description.en_US: Calendar color ID (1-24) referencing the calendar section of the colors definition. Use 'Get Colors' to see available options.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历颜色 ID（1-24），引用颜色定义中的日历部分。使用「获取颜色」工具查看可用选项。

hint.en_US: Predefined color ID (1-11 for calendar)
hint.zh_Hans: 预定义颜色 ID（1-11）

hint.en_US: Whether to show this calendar in the UI
hint.zh_Hans: 是否在界面中显示此日历

description.en_US: Remove a calendar from the user's calendar list
description.zh_Hans: 从用户日历列表中移除日历

llm_description.en_US: Secondary calendar identifier. Must be a calendar email address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Do NOT use "primary" — this operation cannot target the primary calendar. Call "List Calendars" to find available IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 次要日历标识符。必须为日历邮箱地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。不能使用 "primary"——此操作不能用于主日历。调用「列出日历」获取可用 ID。

hint.en_US: Secondary calendar ID (email address). Cannot use "primary". Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 次要日历 ID（邮箱地址格式）。不能使用 "primary"。可通过「列出日历」获取 ID。

description.en_US: List events from a Google Calendar
description.zh_Hans: 从 Google 日历列出事件

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

llm_description.en_US: Free text search terms. Matches against summary, description, location, attendee displayName/email, and organizer displayName/email.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 自由文本搜索。匹配标题、描述、地点、参与者姓名/邮箱、组织者姓名/邮箱。

hint.en_US: Free text search in summary, description, location, attendees, etc.
hint.zh_Hans: 在标题、描述、地点、参与者等字段中搜索

hint.en_US: Limit results to a specific time window
hint.zh_Hans: 将结果限制在指定时间范围内

llm_description.en_US: Lower bound (exclusive) for event end time. RFC3339 timestamp with mandatory timezone offset, e.g. 2025-03-18T00:00:00Z. If timeMax is set, timeMin must be smaller.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件结束时间的下限（不含）。RFC3339 时间戳，必须包含时区偏移。若设置了 timeMax，timeMin 必须更小。

hint.en_US: Lower bound (exclusive) for event end time. RFC3339 with timezone offset. Example: 2025-03-01T00:00:00Z
hint.zh_Hans: 事件结束时间的下限（不含）。RFC3339 格式含时区偏移。示例：2025-03-01T00:00:00Z

llm_description.en_US: Upper bound (exclusive) for event start time. RFC3339 timestamp with mandatory timezone offset. Must be greater than timeMin.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件开始时间的上限（不含）。RFC3339 时间戳，必须包含时区偏移。必须大于 timeMin。

hint.en_US: Upper bound (exclusive) for event start time, must be after Time Min. RFC3339 with timezone offset. Example: 2025-03-31T23:59:59Z
hint.zh_Hans: 事件开始时间的上限（不含），必须晚于最早时间。RFC3339 格式含时区偏移。示例：2025-03-31T23:59:59Z

llm_description.en_US: Maximum number of events per page. Default 250, max 2500. Use nextPageToken for pagination.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 每页最大事件数。默认 250，最大 2500。使用 nextPageToken 分页。

hint.en_US: Maximum number of events to return (1-2500)
hint.zh_Hans: 返回事件的最大数量（1-2500）

llm_description.en_US: If true, expand recurring events into instances and return only single one-off events and instances. Required for orderBy=startTime. Default: true.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 为 true 时将重复事件展开为实例。按开始时间排序时必须为 true。默认：true。

hint.en_US: Expand recurring events into individual instances. Required for orderBy=startTime.
hint.zh_Hans: 将重复事件展开为单独实例，按开始时间排序时必须开启

llm_description.en_US: Result ordering. "startTime" (ascending, requires singleEvents=true) or "updated" (ascending, last modification time).
llm_description.zh_Hans: 结果排序。"startTime"（升序，需要 singleEvents=true）或 "updated"（升序，按最后修改时间）。

hint.en_US: Result order. 'startTime' requires singleEvents=true.
hint.zh_Hans: 结果排序方式，'startTime' 需要展开重复事件

llm_description.en_US: Whether to include deleted events (status "cancelled") in the result. Default: false.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 是否在结果中包含已删除事件（状态为 "cancelled"）。默认：false。

hint.en_US: Include cancelled/deleted events in results
hint.zh_Hans: 在结果中包含已取消/已删除的事件

description.en_US: Create a new event on Google Calendar
description.zh_Hans: 在 Google 日历上创建新事件

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

llm_description.en_US: Title of the event.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件标题。

hint.en_US: Event title/summary
hint.zh_Hans: 事件标题

hint.en_US: If enabled, use date only (no time)
hint.zh_Hans: 启用时仅使用日期（不含时间）

llm_description.en_US: Start time in RFC3339 format. A timezone offset is required unless timezone is specified, e.g. 2025-03-18T09:00:00+08:00 or 2025-03-18T01:00:00Z.
Exclusive end time in RFC3339 format. Must be after start time. A timezone offset is required unless timezone is specified.
llm_description.zh_Hans: RFC3339 格式的结束时间（不含）。必须晚于开始时间。除非指定了时区，否则必须包含时区偏移。

hint.en_US: RFC3339 datetime with timezone offset, must be after start time. Examples: 2025-03-18T10:00:00+08:00, 2025-03-18T02:00:00Z

llm_description.en_US: Start date for all-day events in "yyyy-mm-dd" format, e.g. 2025-03-18.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 全天事件的开始日期，格式为 "yyyy-mm-dd"，例如 2025-03-18。

hint.en_US: Start date for all-day events, format: yyyy-mm-dd. Example: 2025-03-18
hint.zh_Hans: 全天事件开始日期，格式：yyyy-mm-dd。示例：2025-03-18

llm_description.en_US: Exclusive end date for all-day events in "yyyy-mm-dd" format. For a single-day event, set to the day after start_date.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 全天事件的结束日期（不含），格式为 "yyyy-mm-dd"。单日事件应设为 start_date 的下一天。

hint.en_US: End date (exclusive) for all-day events, must be after start date. For a single day, set to the next day. Example: one-day event on Mar 18 → end_date = 2025-03-19
hint.zh_Hans: 全天事件结束日期（不含），必须晚于开始日期。单日事件需设为开始日期的下一天。示例：3月18日一天的事件 → 结束日期 = 2025-03-19

llm_description.en_US: IANA Time Zone Database name, e.g. "America/Los_Angeles", "Asia/Shanghai", "Europe/Zurich". Used for start/end times.
llm_description.zh_Hans: IANA 时区数据库名称，例如 "Asia/Shanghai"、"America/Los_Angeles"。用于开始/结束时间。

hint.en_US: IANA timezone name. Examples: Asia/Shanghai, America/Los_Angeles, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo, UTC
hint.zh_Hans: IANA 时区名称。示例：Asia/Shanghai、America/Los_Angeles、Europe/London、Asia/Tokyo、UTC

llm_description.en_US: Whether to send notifications. "all" = all guests, "externalOnly" = non-Google Calendar guests only, "none" = no notifications.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 是否发送通知。"all" = 所有参与者，"externalOnly" = 仅非 Google 日历参与者，"none" = 不通知。

hint.en_US: Whether to send notifications about the event change
hint.zh_Hans: 是否发送关于事件变更的通知

hint.en_US: Add description and location
hint.zh_Hans: 添加描述和地点

llm_description.en_US: Description of the event. Can contain HTML.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件描述。支持 HTML 格式。

hint.en_US: Event description
hint.zh_Hans: 事件描述

llm_description.en_US: Geographic location of the event as free-form text.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件地理位置，自由格式文本。

hint.en_US: Event location (address or place name)
hint.zh_Hans: 事件地点（地址或场所名称）

hint.en_US: Show additional event options: visibility, transparency, status, color, recurrence and attendees
hint.zh_Hans: 显示更多事件选项：可见性、显示为、状态、颜色、重复规则和参与者

llm_description.en_US: Event visibility. "default" = calendar default, "public" = visible to all, "private" = only attendees, "confidential" = same as private (compatibility).
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件可见性。"default" = 日历默认, "public" = 对所有人可见, "private" = 仅参与者可见, "confidential" = 同 private（兼容性）。

hint.en_US: Visibility of the event
hint.zh_Hans: 事件的可见性

llm_description.en_US: Whether the event blocks time on the calendar. "opaque" = busy (default), "transparent" = available.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件是否在日历上占用时间。"opaque" = 忙碌（默认），"transparent" = 有空。

hint.en_US: Whether the event blocks time on the calendar
hint.zh_Hans: 事件是否在日历上占用时间

llm_description.en_US: Status of the event. "confirmed" = default, "tentative" = tentatively confirmed.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件状态。"confirmed" = 已确认（默认），"tentative" = 暂定。

hint.en_US: Status of the event
hint.zh_Hans: 事件状态

llm_description.en_US: Event color ID (1-11) referencing the event colors definition. Use the 'Get Colors' tool to see available options.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件颜色 ID（1-11），引用事件颜色定义。使用「获取颜色」工具查看可用选项。

hint.en_US: Color ID from colors endpoint (1-11). Use 'Get Colors' to see options.
hint.zh_Hans: 颜色端点中的颜色 ID（1-11），使用「获取颜色」查看选项

llm_description.en_US: Recurrence rule per RFC5545. Examples: RRULE:FREQ=DAILY;COUNT=5, RRULE:FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,WE,FR, RRULE:FREQ=MONTHLY;BYMONTHDAY=15.
llm_description.zh_Hans: RFC5545 重复规则。例如：RRULE:FREQ=DAILY;COUNT=5, RRULE:FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,WE,FR, RRULE:FREQ=MONTHLY;BYMONTHDAY=15。

hint.en_US: RRULE per RFC5545, e.g. RRULE:FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,WE,FR
hint.zh_Hans: RFC5545 RRULE 规则，例如 RRULE:FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,WE,FR

llm_description.en_US: Comma-separated email addresses of attendees. Each must be a valid email per RFC5322.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 参与者邮箱地址，逗号分隔。每个地址必须符合 RFC5322 邮箱格式。

hint.en_US: Comma-separated email addresses of attendees
hint.zh_Hans: 参与者邮箱地址，逗号分隔

description.en_US: Get a single event by ID
description.zh_Hans: 根据 ID 获取单个事件

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

llm_description.en_US: Opaque event identifier. Must be 5-1024 characters, using base32hex characters (lowercase a-v and digits 0-9).
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件标识符。必须为 5-1024 个字符，使用 base32hex 字符（小写字母 a-v 和数字 0-9）。

hint.en_US: The unique identifier of the event
hint.zh_Hans: 事件的唯一标识符

description.en_US: Update an existing event
description.zh_Hans: 更新现有事件

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

llm_description.en_US: Opaque event identifier. Must be 5-1024 characters, using base32hex characters (lowercase a-v and digits 0-9).
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件标识符。必须为 5-1024 个字符，使用 base32hex 字符（小写字母 a-v 和数字 0-9）。

hint.en_US: The unique identifier of the event
hint.zh_Hans: 事件的唯一标识符

hint.en_US: Change event start/end time
hint.zh_Hans: 修改事件开始/结束时间

hint.en_US: Add description and location
hint.zh_Hans: 添加描述和地点

llm_description.en_US: New title of the event. Leave empty to keep unchanged.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 新的事件标题。留空则不修改。

hint.en_US: Event title/summary
hint.zh_Hans: 事件标题

llm_description.en_US: New description of the event. Can contain HTML.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 新的事件描述。支持 HTML 格式。

hint.en_US: Event description
hint.zh_Hans: 事件描述

llm_description.en_US: New geographic location as free-form text.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 新的地理位置，自由格式文本。

hint.en_US: Event location (address or place name)
hint.zh_Hans: 事件地点（地址或场所名称）

llm_description.en_US: New start time in RFC3339 format with timezone offset, e.g. 2025-03-18T09:00:00+08:00.
New exclusive end time in RFC3339 format with timezone offset. Must be after start time.
llm_description.zh_Hans: RFC3339 格式的新结束时间（不含，含时区偏移）。必须晚于开始时间。

hint.en_US: RFC3339 datetime with timezone offset, must be after start time. Examples: 2025-03-18T10:00:00+08:00, 2025-03-18T02:00:00Z

llm_description.en_US: IANA Time Zone Database name, e.g. "Asia/Shanghai", "America/Los_Angeles".
llm_description.zh_Hans: IANA 时区名称，例如 "Asia/Shanghai"、"America/Los_Angeles"。

hint.en_US: IANA timezone name. Examples: Asia/Shanghai, America/Los_Angeles, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo, UTC
hint.zh_Hans: IANA 时区名称。示例：Asia/Shanghai、America/Los_Angeles、Europe/London、Asia/Tokyo、UTC

llm_description.en_US: Whether to send notifications. "all" = all guests, "externalOnly" = non-Google Calendar guests only, "none" = no notifications.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 是否发送通知。"all" = 所有参与者，"externalOnly" = 仅非 Google 日历参与者，"none" = 不通知。

hint.en_US: Whether to send notifications about the event change
hint.zh_Hans: 是否发送关于事件变更的通知

hint.en_US: Show additional event options: visibility, transparency, status, color, recurrence and attendees
hint.zh_Hans: 显示更多事件选项：可见性、显示为、状态、颜色、重复规则和参与者

llm_description.en_US: Event visibility. "default" = calendar default, "public" = visible to all, "private" = only attendees, "confidential" = same as private.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件可见性。"default" = 日历默认, "public" = 对所有人可见, "private" = 仅参与者可见, "confidential" = 同 private。

hint.en_US: Visibility of the event
hint.zh_Hans: 事件的可见性

llm_description.en_US: "opaque" = busy (default), "transparent" = available/free.
llm_description.zh_Hans: "opaque" = 忙碌（默认），"transparent" = 有空。

hint.en_US: Whether the event blocks time on the calendar
hint.zh_Hans: 事件是否在日历上占用时间

llm_description.en_US: "confirmed" = default, "tentative" = tentatively confirmed.
llm_description.zh_Hans: "confirmed" = 已确认（默认），"tentative" = 暂定。

hint.en_US: Status of the event
hint.zh_Hans: 事件状态

llm_description.en_US: Event color ID (1-11) from the colors endpoint.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件颜色 ID（1-11），来自颜色端点。

hint.en_US: Color ID from colors endpoint (1-11). Use 'Get Colors' to see options.
hint.zh_Hans: 颜色端点中的颜色 ID（1-11），使用「获取颜色」查看选项

description.zh_Hans: 从 Google 日历删除事件

llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件标识符。必须为 5-1024 个字符，使用 base32hex 字符（小写字母 a-v 和数字 0-9）。

For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件标识符。必须为 5-1024 个字符，使用 base32hex 字符（小写字母 a-v 和数字 0-9）。

hint.zh_Hans: 将结果限制在指定时间范围内

llm_description.en_US: Lower bound (exclusive) for event end time. RFC3339 timestamp with mandatory timezone offset, e.g. 2025-03-18T00:00:00Z.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件结束时间的下限（不含）。RFC3339 时间戳，必须包含时区偏移，例如 2025-03-18T00:00:00Z。

hint.en_US: Lower bound (exclusive) for event end time. RFC3339 with timezone offset. Example: 2025-03-01T00:00:00Z
hint.zh_Hans: 事件结束时间的下限（不含）。RFC3339 格式含时区偏移。示例：2025-03-01T00:00:00Z

llm_description.en_US: Upper bound (exclusive) for event start time. RFC3339 timestamp with mandatory timezone offset. Must be greater than timeMin.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件开始时间的上限（不含）。RFC3339 时间戳，必须包含时区偏移。必须大于 timeMin。

hint.en_US: Upper bound (exclusive) for event start time, must be after Time Min. RFC3339 with timezone offset. Example: 2025-03-31T23:59:59Z
hint.zh_Hans: 事件开始时间的上限（不含），必须晚于最早时间。RFC3339 格式含时区偏移。示例：2025-03-31T23:59:59Z

llm_description.en_US: Maximum number of instances returned per page. Default 250, max 2500.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 每页返回的最大实例数。默认 250，最大 2500。

hint.en_US: Maximum number of events to return (1-2500)
hint.zh_Hans: 返回事件的最大数量（1-2500）

For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.

hint.zh_Hans: 事件的唯一标识符

llm_description.zh_Hans: 目标日历标识符。使用 "primary" 或日历邮箱地址。

hint.en_US: Target calendar for the event
hint.zh_Hans: 事件的目标日历

llm_description.zh_Hans: 是否发送通知。"all" = 所有参与者，"externalOnly" = 仅非 Google 日历参与者，"none" = 不通知。

description.en_US: Create an event from simple natural language text
description.zh_Hans: 根据简单自然语言文本创建事件

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

llm_description.en_US: Natural language text describing the event. Google parses this to extract title, date, time, and location. Examples: 'Dinner with John tomorrow at 7pm', 'Meeting at Conference Room A on Friday 2pm-3pm'.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 描述事件的自然语言文本。Google 会解析其中的标题、日期、时间和地点。例如：'明天晚上7点和John吃饭'、'周五下午2点到3点在会议室A开会'。

hint.en_US: Natural language, e.g. 'Dinner with John tomorrow at 7pm'
hint.zh_Hans: 自然语言，例如「明天晚上7点和John吃饭」

llm_description.en_US: Whether to send notifications. "all" = all guests, "externalOnly" = non-Google Calendar guests only, "none" = no notifications.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 是否发送通知。"all" = 所有参与者，"externalOnly" = 仅非 Google 日历参与者，"none" = 不通知。

hint.en_US: Whether to send notifications about the event change
hint.zh_Hans: 是否发送关于事件变更的通知

description.en_US: Get a single user setting
description.zh_Hans: 获取单个用户设置

llm_description.en_US: The ID of the user setting. Common values: timezone, locale, weekStart, dateFieldOrder, timeFieldOrder, showDeclinedEvents.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 用户设置的 ID。常见值：timezone、locale、weekStart、dateFieldOrder、timeFieldOrder、showDeclinedEvents。

hint.en_US: e.g. timezone, locale, weekStart
hint.zh_Hans: 例如 timezone, locale, weekStart

description.en_US: List all user settings
description.zh_Hans: 列出所有用户设置

description.en_US: Get calendar and event color definitions
description.zh_Hans: 获取日历和事件的颜色定义

description.en_US: Query busy/free status for calendars in a time range
description.zh_Hans: 查询指定时间范围内日历的忙闲状态

llm_description.en_US: Start of the time range to query. RFC3339 timestamp with timezone offset, e.g. 2025-03-18T00:00:00Z.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 查询时间范围的起始。RFC3339 时间戳（含时区偏移），例如 2025-03-18T00:00:00Z。

hint.en_US: Start of time range (required). RFC3339 with timezone offset. Example: 2025-03-18T00:00:00Z or 2025-03-18T08:00:00+08:00

llm_description.en_US: End of the time range to query. RFC3339 timestamp with timezone offset. Must be after time_min.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 查询时间范围的结束。RFC3339 时间戳（含时区偏移）。必须晚于 time_min。

hint.en_US: End of time range (required), must be after start. RFC3339 with timezone offset. Example: 2025-03-19T00:00:00Z or 2025-03-19T08:00:00+08:00

llm_description.en_US: Comma-separated calendar IDs to query. Use "primary" for the user's primary calendar, or calendar email addresses.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 要查询的日历 ID，逗号分隔。使用 "primary" 表示用户主日历，或使用日历邮箱地址。

hint.en_US: Comma-separated calendar IDs to query
hint.zh_Hans: 要查询的日历 ID，逗号分隔
